summary: Elric, a 7-circle wizard, meets with Dean Verux and presents his theory on the location of the Den, a mysterious site where four mana streams converge. The dean is skeptical but impressed by Elric's reasoning. They propose a wager: if Elric can locate the Den, he will be granted an exploration party to investigate; if he fails, he must hand over his family heirloom.
key_moments: Elric presents his theory on the location of the Den
Dean Verux is skeptical but impressed by Elric's reasoning
The wager is proposed: Elric must locate the Den or hand over his family heirloom
